title: callitriche sessilis var. minima
intro: Callitriche sessilis var. minima, also known as dwarf water starwort, is a small aquatic plant that belongs to the Plantaginaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating digestive problems, and alleviating respiratory issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, Callitriche sessilis var. minima is often used as a tea or infused in water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
